case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,104.00

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 301, MOTION FOR STAY OF ENFORCEMENT OF JUDGMENT FOR ADDITIONAL 90 DYS, CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2001, DENIED NO APPEARANCE-TENTATIVE ADOPTED-DENIED.
